title: BridgeOverlay
description: A clean texture that replaces the clay textures in Minecraft 1.8.9 to a smooth one designed for "The Bridge" minigame
body: A smooth Bridge Duels Overlay which replaces the default clay texture present in the vanilla game (usually version 1.8.9 which is preferred due to superior combat capabilites) with a smooth and clean overlay which makes the blocks look satisfying. Goes well with sound overlays like modrinth.com/rofl-sounds
